content.fact: KB migration is COMPLETE. All 4 phases finished. Phase 1: KB structure + schema + scripts. Phase 2: 15 docs migrated (11 rules + 1 decision + 1 identity + 1 pattern + 1 skill). Phase 3: CLAUDE.md bootloader + hooks + CLI v0.2.0 with migrate-kb command. Phase 4: Old MD files removed, Go CLI implemented, MD system fully retired. The JSON KB is now the sole source of truth.
content.historical_note: This doc is kept as a historical record. The migration from Markdown rules to JSON Knowledge Base was a foundational architectural change that defined how Leo stores and propagates knowledge.
